name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech from Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 – Present); Class XII from Govt. Boys Senior Secondary School (2023)

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy for schizophrenia detection using EEG data. Applied bandpass filtering and temporal windowing for robust feature extraction, and improved interpretability using Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system integrating real-time face recognition using OpenCV with conversational AI for personalized interaction. Ensured high-accuracy face matching with efficient encoding and secure data handling.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal enabling execution of complex shell operations via natural language. Integrated Google’s generative AI models for intelligent command understanding and published it as a PyPI package.
